pipeline_architecture.name: KMeansPipe
pipeline_architecture.description: Pipeline-style K-means clustering with functional composition for unsupervised learning

outputs.description: Function that prepares data for clustering from a KMeansPipe

prepare_clustering_data.description: Prepare and preprocess data for K-means clustering with scaling and outlier handling

outputs.description: Function that engineers clustering features from a KMeansPipe

engineer_clustering_features.description: Create advanced features optimized for clustering algorithms

outputs.description: Function that reduces dimensions from a KMeansPipe

reduce_dimensions.description: Apply dimensionality reduction for visualization and clustering efficiency

outputs.description: Function that configures K-means clustering in a KMeansPipe
Function that configures MiniBatch K-means in a KMeansPipe

configure_minibatch_kmeans.description: Configure MiniBatch K-means for large-scale clustering

outputs.description: Function that fits K-means clustering from a KMeansPipe

fit_kmeans.description: Train K-means model and assign cluster labels

outputs.description: Function that evaluates clustering quality from a KMeansPipe
Function that profiles clusters from a KMeansPipe

profile_clusters.description: Create detailed statistical profiles of each cluster

outputs.description: Function that finds optimal number of clusters from a KMeansPipe

find_optimal_k.description: Determine optimal k using elbow method and silhouette analysis

outputs.description: Function that plots 2D cluster visualization from a KMeansPipe

plot_clusters_2d.description: Visualize clusters in 2D feature space with centroids

outputs.description: Function that plots cluster profile heatmaps from a KMeansPipe
Function that plots elbow curve from a KMeansPipe

plot_elbow_curve.description: Plot elbow curve for optimal k selection using within-cluster sum of squares

outputs.description: Function that plots silhouette scores from a KMeansPipe

plot_silhouette_scores.description: Plot silhouette scores across different k values for cluster quality assessment

outputs.description: Function that saves K-means model from a KMeansPipe

save_kmeans_model.description: Save trained clustering model with preprocessing pipeline and cluster profiles

outputs.description: Function that prints cluster summary from a KMeansPipe

print_cluster_summary.description: Print comprehensive clustering analysis summary and insights

pipeline_data_structure.data: Main DataFrame with features and cluster assignments
pipeline_data_structure.feature_columns: List of feature column names used for clustering
pipeline_data_structure.models: Dictionary of configured and fitted K-means models
pipeline_data_structure.cluster_assignments: Dictionary of cluster labels and metadata
pipeline_data_structure.cluster_profiles: Dictionary of detailed cluster statistical profiles
pipeline_data_structure.elbow_analysis: Dictionary of elbow method analysis results
pipeline_data_structure.visualization_data: Dictionary of data prepared for visualizations

k_means_algorithm.description: Partitioning algorithm that groups data into k clusters

optimal_k_selection.elbow_method: Find k where inertia decrease rate changes dramatically
optimal_k_selection.silhouette_analysis: Choose k that maximizes average silhouette score
optimal_k_selection.combined_approach: Use both methods for robust k selection

evaluation_metrics.silhouette_score: Measures how similar points are to their own cluster vs other clusters (-1 to 1, higher better)
evaluation_metrics.calinski_harabasz_score: Ratio of between-cluster to within-cluster dispersion (higher better)
evaluation_metrics.inertia: Within-cluster sum of squares (lower better, but depends on k)

data_preparation: Consider feature selection for high-dimensional data
evaluation: Validate with external criteria when available

use_cases.customer_segmentation: Group customers by behavior, demographics, value
use_cases.feature_engineering: Create cluster-based features for supervised learning
use_cases.gene_expression: Group genes with similar expression patterns

example_complete_pipeline: KMeansPipe.from_dataframe(df) | prepare_clustering_data(['age', 'income', 'spending'], scaling_method='standard') | engineer_clustering_features(interaction_features=True, ratio_features=[('spending', 'income')]) | find_optimal_k(k_range=(2, 10), method='both') | configure_kmeans(n_clusters=5) | fit_kmeans('customer_segments') | evaluate_clustering('customer_segments') | profile_clusters('customer_segments') | plot_clusters_2d('customer_segments', 'income', 'spending') | save_kmeans_model('customer_segments')
